title: snap
body:
Added snapcraft.yaml to build a [snap](https://snapcraft.io/) package for buildah. This Snap for buildah makes the installation and setup of buildah easier for the user by auto-updating to the latest version of buildah and can also rollback to the previous version if something breaks.

Signed-off-by: Michael Royal <mikerr90@outlook.com>
# Prep
sudo snap install snapcraft --classic
sudo snap install multipass --beta --classic

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

Thanks @mikeroyal You need to sign your PR.

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force

Also could you add better description to the PR.

@lsm5 @jnovy @cevich PTAL

@mikeroyal thanks a lot for this. I'm thinking before we merge this, do you wanna build a snap and publish it to the snap store edge channel, so we can try this out first? AFAIK, I own the buildah snap on the snap store, but let me check at adding you as contributor to it.

Hi @lsm5, 

Yeah, I can build it.
@mikeroyal Can you fix your PR so we can get it merged.

Hi @rhatdan, I just decided to make a new PR instead #1791  so I will close this one and you can merge the new one.
